Power.Choice.Title: Choice
Power.Choice.Description: Pick which power you want from a given selection
Power.Choice.Lore:
A curious bubble that shifts and reforms itself into other power bubbles.
All my attempts to control the forms it shifts into have failed. The only rule it seems to abide by is chaos.
- Thought Bubble
Not knowing what you're gonna get makes it more fun!
- Gachapon
Power.ChargeShot.Title: Charge Shot
Power.ChargeShot.Description: Increases the <size=28><color=#FFED75>damage</color></size> of your <size=28><color=#FFED75>secondary attack</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>50%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+50% per stack)</color></size> and the <size=28><color=#FFED75>size</color></size> of your <size=28><color=#FFED75>secondary attacks</color></size> by 40% <size=24><color=#999999>(+40% per stack)</color></size>
Power.ChargeShot.Brief: Increases the size and damage of your secondary attack
Power.ChargeShot.Lore:
Through concentration, allows one to greatly increase the size of a single bubble.
Bigger is always better!
- Gachapon
That is not true.
- Thought Bubble
It is true
- Bubblemancer
Power.Shotgun.Title: Shotgun
Power.Shotgun.Description: Increases the amount of bubbles shot by your <size=28><color=#FFED75>primary attack</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>20%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+20% per stack)</color></size>
Power.Shotgun.Brief: Increases the amount of bubbles shot by your primary attack
Power.Shotgun.Lore:
The extra bubbles seem to split from others included in the attack with perfect replication.
- Thought Bubble
Power.Dash.Title: Sparkle Sparkle
Power.Dash.Brief: Adds damaging stars to your ability
Power.Dash.Lore: Sharpens stars out of the friction created by the use of a signature ability.
Power.Dash.ThoughtBubbleDescription: <size=28><color=#FFED75>Channeling recall</color></size> has a <size=28><color=#FFED75>33%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+17% per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>chance</color></size> to release damaging stars
Power.Dash.GachaponDescription: <size=28><color=#FFED75>Chips</color></size> have a <size=28><color=#FFED75>50%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+25% per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>chance</color></size> to release damaging stars
Power.Dash.FizzyDescription: <size=28><color=#FFED75>Skateboard</color></size> releases a damaging star every <size=28><color=#FFED75>1.0 seconds</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(-25% per stack)</color></size>
Power.ShotSpeed.Title: Bubble Propulsion
Power.ShotSpeed.Description: Small bubbles travel <size=28><color=#FFED75>10%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+10% per stack)</color></size> further and faster
Power.ShotSpeed.Brief: Small bubbles travel further and faster
Power.ShotSpeed.Lore:
Makes bubbles more aerodynamic, even beyond the realm that science would allow.

This must come from a universe where bubbles are faster!
- Bubblemancer

That almost makes sense, but no.
- Thought Bubble

That makes a lotta sense
- Gachapon
Power.Starbarbs.Title: Starbarbs
Power.Starbarbs.Description: Enemies <size=28><color=#FFED75>killed by stars</color></size> explode into <size=28><color=#FFED75>3</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size> stars
Power.Starbarbs.Brief: Enemies killed by stars explode into stars
Power.Starbarbs.Lore: Much like a supernova, the end of one creature's existence gives rise to more stars.
Power.SoapySoap.Title: Soapy Soap
Power.SoapySoap.Description: <size=28><color=#FFED75>Secondary attack</color></size> releases <size=28><color=#FFED75>4</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+4 per stack)</color></size> bubbles while traveling, plus <size=28><color=#FFED75>2 more bubbles for each charge level</color></size>
Power.SoapySoap.Brief: Secondary attack leaves behind a trail of bubbles
Power.SoapySoap.Lore:
Coats your secondary attack with soap. More soap means more bubbles!
Imagine how much money I could make with this one! Too bad it always disintegrates...
- Gachapon
Power.BubbleBlast.Title: Bubble Blast
Power.BubbleBlast.Description: <size=28><color=#FFED75>Secondary attack</color></size> releases <size=28><color=#FFED75>4</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+3 per stack)</color></size> bubbles upon expiring, plus <size=28><color=#FFED75>1</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>more bubbles for each charge level</color></size>
Power.BubbleBlast.Brief: Secondary attack releases bubbles upon expiring
Power.BubbleBlast.Lore: The greatest of bubbles always leave behind a legacy for the next generation.
Power.Starshot.Title: Starshot
Power.Starshot.Description:
<size=28><color=#FFED75>15%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+5% per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>chance</color></size> to launch stars with your <size=28><color=#FFED75>primary attack</color></size> 
Increases the amount of bubbles shot by your <size=28><color=#FFED75>primary attack</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>20%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+20% per stack)</color></size>
Power.Starshot.Brief: Launch stars with your primary attack
Power.Starshot.Lore: Bravely shepherded by a hero pure of being, the paths of Star and Bubble become one.
Power.WeaponUpgrade.Title: Haste
Power.WeaponUpgrade.Lore:
Grants supernatural alacrity to the bearer.
Using this power reminds me of the stories my grandpa used to tell me about the Winged Bubble, the savior who could drift upon the winds with wings of finest cotton. It makes me feel like...even I could be a part of that legend.
- Bubblemancer

Sword not included. What a disappointment.
- Gachapon
Power.BinaryStars.Title: Binary Stars
Power.BinaryStars.Description: Release <size=28><color=#FFED75>2</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size> stars every <size=28><color=#FFED75>1.5 seconds</color></size>
Power.BinaryStars.Lore:
Two stars locked by gravitational forces. A blessing from beyond the sky.
Does this mean I'm a planet?!
- Bubblemancer

Stars do not orbit planets. But yes, you have satellites.
- Thought Bubble
Power.EternalBubbles.Title: Elder Bubbles
Power.EternalBubbles.Description: Increases lifespan of <size=28><color=#FFED75>small bubbles</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>0.8 seconds</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+0.4 seconds per stack)</color></size>
Power.EternalBubbles.Lore:
Grants the wisdom of age to smaller bubble projectiles, making them last longer before popping.
"Don't go livin' yer life in one shot, y'hear?" That's what my Grandpa used to say to me.
- Bubblemancer
Power.BubbleBirb.Title: Bubble Birb
Power.BubbleBirb.Description: Resurrect in a dance of flames after death <size=24><color=#999999>(consumed on use)</color></size>
Power.BubbleBirb.Brief: Resurrect in a dance of flames after death
Power.BubbleBirb.Lore:
I know this one! The Bubble Birb is a mythical creature said to be able to grant a second chance after being popped.
- Bubblemancer

There was one long ago who danced with those flames. I remember.
- Thought Bubble
Power.BubbleTrail.Title: Bubble Trail
Power.BubbleTrail.Description: Release a bubble every <size=28><color=#FFED75>0.67 seconds</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(-33% per stack)</color></size>
Power.Coalescence.Title: Coalescence
Power.Coalescence.Description: <size=28><color=#FFED75>Small bubbles</color></size> may fuse with up to <size=28><color=#FFED75>1</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size> other nearby <size=28><color=#FFED75>small bubbles,</color></size> gaining <size=28><color=#FFED75>+2 damage</color></size> and <size=28><color=#FFED75>+1 pierce</color></size> each fusion
Power.Coalescence.Brief: Small bubbles may fuse with nearby bubbles for bonus damage and pierce
Power.Coalescence.Lore: The diminutive, united, shall become the gestalt one.
Power.LuckyStar.Title: Lucky Star
Power.LuckyStar.Description:
Enemies <size=28><color=#FFED75>killed by stars</color></size> have a <size=28><color=#FFED75>4%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1% per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>chance</color></size> to <size=28><color=#FFED75>drop powers</color></size> 
This effect can only happen <size=28><color=#FFED75>3</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>times</color></size> per <size=28><color=#FFED75>wave</color></size>
Power.LuckyStar.Brief: Enemies killed by stars have a chance to drop powers
Power.LuckyStar.Lore:
Some say the fortunes of bubblekind are written in the stars.

Gimme dat
- Gachapon
Power.TrailOfThoughts.Title: Trail of Thoughts
Power.TrailOfThoughts.Description: Increases the <size=28><color=#FFED75>maximum length</color></size> of your <size=28><color=#FFED75>thought trail</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>3</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+3 per stacK)</color></size> and <size=28><color=#FFED75>zap radius</color></size> of your <size=28><color=#FFED75>thought trail</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>10%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+10 per stack)</color></size>
Power.TrailOfThoughts.Brief: Increases thought trail length and zap radius
Power.TrailOfThoughts.Lore: Allows a learned bubble to further manifest their thoughts as projectile bubbles.
Power.Magnet.Title: Magnet
Power.Magnet.Description:
Extends the distance <size=28><color=#FFED75>coins</color></size> are collected from by <size=28><color=#FFED75>75%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+75% per stack)</color></size> 
<size=28><color=#FFED75>Wave end</color></size> reward gives <size=28><color=#FFED75>5</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+5 per stack)</color></size> additional <size=28><color=#FFED75>coins</color></size>
Power.Magnet.Brief: Collect coins from farther away and gain bonus coins from wave rewards
Power.Magnet.Lore:
Imbues the user's very essence with magnetism, allowing the easy attraction and collection of money.
Why doesn't magnetism work on bubbles?
- Bubblemancer

Bubbles are not made of metal.
- Thought Bubble

Oh
- Bubblemancer

I don't get it
- Bubblemancer
Power.Magnet.SlotMachineWeaponDescriptio:
Extends the distance <size=28><color=#FFED75>coins</color></size> and <size=28><color=#FFED75>tokens</color></size> are collected from by <size=28><color=#FFED75>75%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+75% per stack)</color></size> 
<size=28><color=#FFED75>Wave end</color></size> reward gives <size=28><color=#FFED75>5</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+5 per stack)</color></size> additional <size=28><color=#FFED75>coins</color></size>
Power.SpearOfLight.Title: Spear of Light
Power.SpearOfLight.Description: Fire <size=28><color=#FFED75>beams of light</color></size> at enemies within <size=28><color=#FFED75>9</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+2.25 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>units</color></size> for <size=28><color=#FFED75>2 damage</color></size> every <size=28><color=#FFED75>2.2 seconds</color></size> and increase <size=28><color=#FFED75>beam of light damage</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>0.5</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+0.5 per stack)</color></size>

Power.SpearOfLight.Lore: So many thoughts rush through TB's head at times that he simply must get some of them out there.
Power.Overclock.Title: Overclock
Power.Overclock.Lore:
Increases the speed of a bubble can use their unique abilities with the ruthlessness efficiency of a machine.
A very interesting power bubble. Its power seems to affect time itself, but in a very limited manner.
- Thought Bubble
Power.NeuronActivation.Title: Reflection
Power.NeuronActivation.Description: Enemies <size=28><color=#FFED75>struck by beams of light</color></size> bounce <size=28><color=#FFED75>beams of light</color></size> to nearby enemies once; bounced <size=28><color=#FFED75>beams of light gain 20%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+60% per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>damage</color></size>
Power.NeuronActivation.Brief: Enemies struck by beams of light fire beams of light at nearby enemies
Power.NeuronActivation.Lore: All creatures are but prisms for Thought Bubble's thoughts.
Power.BrainBlast.Title: Brain Blast
Power.BrainBlast.Description:
Release <size=28><color=#FFED75>20%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+10% per stack)</color></size> more bubbles when <size=28><color=#FFED75>channeling recall</color></size> and explode into <size=28><color=#FFED75>1</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+0.5 per stack)</color></size> additional bubbles per segment <size=28><color=#FFED75>after recall</color></size> 
Increase <size=28><color=#FFED75>thought trail zap damage</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>20%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+20% per stack)</color></size>

Power.BrainBlast.Lore: One must go back through all they have learned to obtain progress.
Power.Raise.Title: Raise

Power.Raise.Lore:
Allows a chaotic bubble to increase the stakes.
If you're losing you just gotta bet more!
- Gachapon

Got it
- Bubblemancer

Don't listen to her.
- Thought Bubble
Power.AllIn.Title: All-In
Power.AllIn.Description:
Increases <size=28><color=#FFED75>total chip stacks</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>2</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+2 per stack)</color></size> and grants a <size=28><color=#FFED75>5%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+5% per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>chance</color></size> for chips to be enhanced

Power.AllIn.Lore: The chaotic one shall risk everything for the sake of power, claiming that there's "nowhere to go but up, baby".
Power.SnakeEyes.Title: Snake Eyes
Power.SnakeEyes.Description: <size=28><color=#FFED75>20%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1% per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>chance</color></size> to poison enemies on hit, dealing <size=28><color=#FFED75>4</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size> Y: damage plus <size=28><color=#FFED75>damage</color></size> equal to <size=28><color=#FFED75>4%</color></size> of the <size=28><color=#FFED75>victim's max life</color></size> over <size=28><color=#FFED75>10 seconds</color></size>
Power.SnakeEyes.Brief: Chance to poison enemies on hit
Power.SnakeEyes.Lore: Those who know not that their luck has run out are relegated to a slow and insidious demise.
Power.Refraction.Title: Refraction
Power.Refraction.Description: <size=28><color=#FFED75>Beams of light</color></size> target up to <size=28><color=#FFED75>1</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size> additional enemies within <size=28><color=#FFED75>9</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+2 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>units,</color></size> but they <size=28><color=#FFED75>lose 20% damage</color></size> each hit after the first

Power.Calculator.Title: Calculator
Power.Calculator.Description: Friendly projectiles <size=28><color=#FFED75>seek out</color></size> enemies within <size=28><color=#FFED75>4</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+2 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>units</color></size>
Power.Calculator.Lore:
A machine that allows one to analyze and calculate the movement of enemies.

Do not ever play darts with this guy.
- Gachapon
Power.BubbleMitosis.Title: Mitosis
Power.BubbleMitosis.Description: <size=28><color=#FFED75>Upon obtaining your next power,</color></size> gain <size=28><color=#FFED75>additional stacks</color></size> equal to the amount of <color=#BAE3FE>Mitosis</color> stacks <size=24><color=#999999>(consumed on use)</color></size>
Power.BubbleMitosis.Brief: Assimilated into next power you obtain
Power.BubbleMitosis.Lore:
Containing powerful replicating abilities, this can be used on any other power bubble.
In principle, this is the opposite of the Choice bubble, containing similar powers of replication but only triggering when coming into contact with another power bubble.
- TB
Power.RollForCharisma.Title: Roll For Charisma
Power.RollForCharisma.Description: <size=28><color=#FFED75>20%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1% per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>chance</color></size> to <size=28><color=#FFED75>heal</color></size> after <size=28><color=#FFED75>purchasing a power</color></size> or gain <size=28><color=#FFED75>25</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+25 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>coins</color></size> if uninjured
Power.RollForCharisma.Brief: Chance to heal or refund a portion of money spent when purchasing power
Power.RollForCharisma.Lore:
Gachapon is not easily haggled with, but she's a sucker for bubbles in sunglasses.
They're just so versatile!
- Gachapon

Waitwait, who wrote this one?!
- Gachapon
Power.RollForDexterity.Title: Roll For Dexterity
Power.RollForDexterity.Description: <size=28><color=#FFED75>20%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1% per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>chance</color></size> to gain <size=28><color=#FFED75>15%</color></size> increased <size=28><color=#FFED75>movement speed</color></size> after using <size=28><color=#FFED75>your ability,</color></size> stacking up to <size=28><color=#FFED75>2</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size> times and lasting <size=28><color=#FFED75>5 seconds</color></size>
Power.RollForDexterity.Brief: Chance to gain increased speed after using your ability
Power.RollForDexterity.Lore:
The Winged Bubble was known to be a rogue who favored games of chance. However, he was always ready to slip away if the game went awry for him.
- Bubblemancer
Power.RollForInitiative.Title: Roll For Initiative
Power.RollForInitiative.Description: <size=28><color=#FFED75>20%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1% per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>chance</color></size> to deal <size=28><color=#FFED75>200%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+20% per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>bonus damage</color></size> on <size=28><color=#FFED75>first strike</color></size>
Power.RollForInitiative.Brief: Chance for first hit to deal additional damage
Power.RollForInitiative.Lore: Some claim that the name of an ancient god must be invoked for the power of this bubble to work, but more learned minds state that it merely allows one to take opponents by surprise.
Power.RollForPerception.Title: Roll For Perception
Power.RollForPerception.Description: Increases weights of <size=28><color=#FFED75>rare powers</color></size> in the <size=28><color=#FFED75>power pool</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>20%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+20% per stack)</color></size>
Power.RollForPerception.Brief: Chance of seeing rare powers increased
Power.RollForPerception.Lore:
Perhaps that which you were looking for was always right there in front of you.

GIMME DAT
- Gachapon
Power.RollForPerception.SlotMachineWeapo: Chance of seeing rare powers and rare spins increased

Increases weights of <size=28><color=#FFED75>rare powers</color></size> in the <size=28><color=#FFED75>power pool</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>20%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+20% per stack)</color></size> 
Increases the likelihood of <size=28><color=#FFED75>high-rarity spins</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>20%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+20% per stack)</color></size>
Power.BubbleShield.Title: Bubble Shield
Power.BubbleShield.Description:
Gain a <size=28><color=#FFED75>shield</color></size> on pickup and at the start of <size=28><color=#FFED75>even-numbered waves</color></size> 
When a <size=28><color=#FFED75>shield is broken,</color></size> extend <size=28><color=#FFED75>immunity frames</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>40%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+20% per stack)</color></size> and release <size=28><color=#FFED75>24</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+8 per stack)</color></size> bubbles
Power.BubbleShield.Brief:
Gain a shield on even-numbered waves
When shields are broken, extend immunity frames and release bubbles
Power.BubbleShield.Lore:
"Whatcha really need is this here bubble shield: quality assured by real bubbles! If it doesn't actually work, it's not like our customers will come back to complain."
- Unknown
Power.ZapRadius.Title: Zap Radius
Power.ZapRadius.Description: Increases <size=28><color=#FFED75>thunder bubble radius</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>10%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+10% per stack)</color></size>
Power.ZapRadius.Lore: Concentrated thunder essence that increases area of effect for thunder bubbles.
Power.Electroluminescence.Title: Electroluminescence
Power.Electroluminescence.Description: <size=28><color=#FFED75>Thunder bubbles</color></size> fire <size=28><color=#FFED75>1</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>beams of light</color></size> at enemies within <size=28><color=#FFED75>3</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+0.5 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>units</color></size> of the <size=28><color=#FFED75>thunder bubble radius</color></size> for <size=28><color=#FFED75>2 damage</color></size>
Power.Electroluminescence.Brief: Thunder bubbles fire beams of light at nearby enemies
Power.Electroluminescence.Lore: The learned one's revelations shall be declared like a thunderous bell from above.
Power.Burger.Title: Burger
Power.Burger.Description:
Increases <size=28><color=#FFED75>attack speed</color></size> and <size=28><color=#FFED75>damage</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>10%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+10% per stack)</color></size> 
Reduces <size=28><color=#FFED75>movement speed</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>10%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+10% per stack)</color></size>
Power.Burger.Lore:
Delicious and nutritious.

And auspicious!
- Gachapon

Just try not to pack down too many at once.
- Fizzy
Power.BonusBatteries.Title: Bonus Batteries
Power.BonusBatteries.Description: Increases the number of <size=28><color=#FFED75>thunder bubbles</color></size> you can cast by <size=28><color=#FFED75>1</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size>
Power.BonusBatteries.Brief: Increases the number of thunder bubbles you can cast
Power.BonusBatteries.Lore:
I developed these batteries to contain thunder essence. My research into thunder is still ongoing, but the current disaster necessitated its unfortunate weaponization.
- Thought Bubble
Power.ResearchNotes.Title: Research Notes
Power.ResearchNotes.Description: <size=28><color=#FFED75>After killing 3 Skull enemies,</color></size> become a <color=#CFCFFF>Choice</color> with 5 options <size=24><color=#999999>(consumed on use)</color></size>
Power.ResearchNotes.Brief: After killing 3 Skull enemies, become a Choice with 5 options
Power.ResearchNotes.Lore:
The energy signature of enhanced Bubbleverse creatures closely matches that of power bubbles. My working hypothesis is that they both draw power from the same source, yet that power remains very unwieldy.
- Thought Bubble
Power.ResearchGrants.Title: Research Grants
Power.ResearchGrants.Lore:
I don't know who is providing these grants, but they are appreciated nonetheless.
- Thought Bubble
Power.Boomerang.Title: Electric Boomerang
Power.Boomerang.Description: Increases <size=28><color=#FFED75>thunder bubble</color></size> recall damage by <size=28><color=#FFED75>50%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+50% per stack)</color></size>
Power.Boomerang.Lore:
A pre-Bubblespace Disaster Power Bubble. Channels the essence of a weapon that always comes back to increase the recall damage of thunder orbs.

Boomerang not included. What a disappointment.
- Gachapon
Power.ThunderBubbles.Title: Echo Bubbles
Power.ThunderBubbles.Description: When recalled or after expiring, <size=28><color=#FFED75>thunder bubbles</color></size> leave behind a <size=28><color=#FFED75>latent charge</color></size> that dissipates into <size=28><color=#FFED75>3</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size> bubbles after <size=28><color=#FFED75>thunder bubbles</color></size> are fully recalled
Power.ThunderBubbles.Brief: Thunder bubbles release bubbles when recalled or expired
Power.ThunderBubbles.Lore:
Synthesizes bubbles from thunder essence, after the thunderclap.

In my research of the Mt. Bubble thunderstorms, I found that the thunder's echoing sound itself could occasionally generate bubbles.
- Thought Bubble
Power.Supernova.Title: Supernova
Power.Supernova.Description:
Stars have a <size=28><color=#FFED75>20% chance</color></size> to <size=28><color=#FFED75>detonate</color></size> on hit for <size=28><color=#FFED75>10</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+5 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>damage</color></size> 
Activates <color=#BAE3FE>Starbarbs</color> and <color=#BAE3FE>Lucky Star</color>
Power.Supernova.Brief: Stars have a chance to explode
Power.Supernova.Lore: A brilliant flash to mark the end of a star's life.
Power.ResonanceRuby.Title: Resonance Ruby
Power.ResonanceRuby.Description:
Increases the <size=28><color=#FFED75>quality</color></size> of <size=28><color=#FFED75>wave rewards</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>20%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+20% per stack)</color></size> 
<size=28><color=#FFED75>Wave</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>end</color></size> gains an additional <size=28><color=#FFED75>10%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+10% per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>chance</color></size> to contain a <size=28><color=#FFED75>bonus power reward</color></size>
Power.ResonanceRuby.Lore:
A musical gem attuned to the resonance of pylons that attracts rarer power bubbles.

In this case, I am truly stumped as to the workings of this gem. A musician would probably find more sense in it than I can. Anybody?
- TB

Nope.
- Fizzy

Nuh-uh.
- Gachapon

I used to play a bit of flute, but all I can say is the pylon's hum sounds kind of like the ruby's resonance
- Bubblemancer

Sigh. I guess I'll just have to accept that for now.
- TB
Power.DoubleDown.Title: Double Down
Power.DoubleDown.Description:
Enemies <size=28><color=#FFED75>killed by chips</color></size> drop additional <size=28><color=#FFED75>coins</color></size> equal to the <size=28><color=#FFED75>overkill damage dealt</color></size> up to a <size=28><color=#FFED75>maximum of 5 coins</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+3 per stack)</color></size> 
Increases <size=28><color=#FFED75>chip damage</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>1</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size>
Power.DoubleDown.Brief: Enemies killed by chips drop additional coins and increases chip damage
Power.DoubleDown.Lore:
Imbues a token exchanged for money with the abilty to generate more money.

My favorite part!
- Gachapon
Power.FocusFizz.Title: Focus Fizz
Power.FocusFizz.Description: Increases <size=28><color=#FFED75>critical strike chance</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>5%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+5% per stack)</color></size>
Power.FocusFizz.Lore:
A tasty beverage that heightens the consumer's combat abilities.

10/10, just wish it came in a wider variety of flavors.
- Fizzy

Drinking it makes me feel weird...is it making me angrier? More violent? Or just more focused?
- Bubblemancer

Trust the process buddy.
- Fizzy
Power.Coupons.Title: Coupons
Power.Coupons.Description: Reduces the cost of <size=28><color=#FFED75>powers</color></size> in the <size=28><color=#FFED75>shop</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>12%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+12% per stack)</color></size>
Power.Coupons.Brief: Reduces the cost of powers in the shop
Power.Coupons.Lore:
Some coupons for Gachapon's shop. Perhaps the concept of a discount itself is contained within this power bubble.

TOO MANY COUPONS NOW!!! If I ever catch the bubble who powerfied this...
- Gachapon
Power.CloudWalker.Title: Cloud Walkers
Power.CloudWalker.Lore:
An ancient hero's artifact with its speediness now contained in a power bubble.

Another item from the Winged Bubble! These must be what he used to dance upon the clouds!
- Bubblemancer

If he had wings, why did he also need magic cloud-walking shoes?
- Gachapon

Uh...well...maybe he would just get tired at some point? Flying all the time sounds hard!
- Bubblemancer

You don't need an excuse to have some sweet kicks.
- Fizzy
Power.PerpetualBubbleMachine.Title: Perpetual Bubble Machine
Power.PerpetualBubbleMachine.Description:
Adds <size=28><color=#FFED75>1</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size> <color=#CFCFFF>Choice</color> to <size=28><color=#FFED75>wave end</color></size> rewards
R:[Rainbow Shard replication cost increases with stack size]
Power.PerpetualBubbleMachine.Brief: The key to infinite bubble forever?
Power.PerpetualBubbleMachine.Lore:
A mythical device that continuously pumps out power bubbles in a chaotic state, seemingly powered by a pylon.

Was this machine actually built, and then contained? Or is this power bubble merely the result of someone thinking they had made such a machine?
- TB
Power.ConsolationPrize.Title: Consolation Prize
Power.ConsolationPrize.Description:
Increases <size=28><color=#FFED75>non-winning spin damage</color></size> and <size=28><color=#FFED75>secondary attack damage</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>10%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+10% per stack)</color></size> 
<size=28><color=#FFED75>7.77%</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>chance</color></size> to gain <size=28><color=#FFED75>2</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+2 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>coins</color></size> on <size=28><color=#FFED75>non-winning spins</color></size> 
<size=28><color=#FFAAAAFF>Increases spin price by 0.25</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+0.25 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFAAAAFF>coins</color></size>
Power.ConsolationPrize.Brief: Increases non-winning spin damage, secondary attack damage, and gives a chance for consolation coins
Power.ConsolationPrize.Lore: A power that appreciates a gambling bubble's time and effort, if nothing else.
Power.Pity.Title: Pity Charm
Power.Pity.Description:
Each consecutive <size=28><color=#FFED75>non-Jackpot spin</color></size> increases <size=28><color=#FFED75>Jackpot chance</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>4%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+2% per stack)</color></size> 
<size=28><color=#FFAAAAFF>Increases spin price by 0.25</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+0.25 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFAAAAFF>coins</color></size>
Power.Pity.Brief: Increases Jackpot chance after consecutive spins without a Jackpot
Power.Pity.Lore: Allows a gambling bubble to eventually obtain what they seek. Eventually.
Power.TokenPouch.Title: Token Pouch
Power.TokenPouch.Description:
Increases the number of <size=28><color=#FFED75>tokens</color></size> you can hold by <size=28><color=#FFED75>2</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+2 per stack)</color></size> 
<size=28><color=#FFAAAAFF>Increases spin price by 0.25</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+0.25 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFAAAAFF>coins</color></size>
Power.TokenPouch.Lore: Tokens are surprisingly bulky and inconvenient to carry. Maybe someone didn't want gamblers to stockpile too many of them.
Power.BOGOSpin.Title: Buy One Get One
Power.BOGOSpin.Description:
Get a <size=28><color=#FFED75>Bonus spin</color></size> on <size=28><color=#FFED75>10%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+10% per stack)</color></size> of <size=28><color=#FFED75>spins</color></size> 
Each <size=28><color=#FFED75>Bonus spin</color></size> has <size=28><color=#FFED75>77.7%</color></size> increased <size=28><color=#FFED75>attack speed</color></size> for <size=28><color=#FFED75>every spin that came before it</color></size> 
<size=28><color=#FFAAAAFF>Increases spin price by</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFAAAAFF>1</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFAAAAFF>coins</color></size>
Power.BOGOSpin.Brief: Sometimes get a Bonus spin for free
Power.BOGOSpin.Lore: An nice shopping deal applied to the concept of gambling.
Power.PhilosophersStone.Title: Philosopher's Stone
Power.PhilosophersStone.Description:
Increases <size=28><color=#FFED75>damage</color></size> of <size=28><color=#FFED75>high-rarity spins</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>10%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+10% per stack)</color></size> and <size=28><color=#FFED75>high-rarity spins</color></size> drop <size=28><color=#FFED75>50%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+50% per stack)</color></size> more <size=28><color=#FFED75>coins</color></size> on hit 
<size=28><color=#FFAAAAFF>Increases spin price by</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFAAAAFF>2</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+2 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFAAAAFF>coins</color></size>
Power.PhilosophersStone.Brief: Increases the damage dealt and coins dropped by high-rarity spins
Power.PhilosophersStone.Lore:
A strange stone that seems conducive to the generation of wealth in fortuitous circumstances.

An alien artifact that I cannot even begin to guess the origin of. It seems to hold a great amount of power given its ability to create precious metals so easily, but uncovering the method by which this occurs would take extensive research.
- TB

All I need to know is where I can get more of 'em!!!
- Gachapon
Power.RouletteWheel.Title: Roulette Wheel
Power.RouletteWheel.Description:
Increases the <size=28><color=#FFED75>burst count</color></size> of your <size=28><color=#FFED75>primary attack</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>1</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size> 
Each <size=28><color=#FFED75>burst</color></size> has <size=28><color=#FFED75>7.77%</color></size> increased <size=28><color=#FFED75>attack speed</color></size> for <size=28><color=#FFED75>every burst in the same spin that came before it</color></size> 
<size=28><color=#FFAAAAFF>Increases spin price by</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFAAAAFF>4</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+4 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFAAAAFF>coins</color></size>
Power.RouletteWheel.Lore: A power bubble that uses the another form of spinning gambling devices to enhance the bubble output of one of Gachapon's slot machines.
Power.BatterUp.Title: Batter Up
Power.BatterUp.Description: <size=28><color=#FFED75>Secondary attack</color></size> launches <size=28><color=#FFED75>1</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>Curveball Tokens</color></size> for <size=28><color=#FFED75>50% secondary attack damage</color></size> that drop <size=28><color=#FFED75>1</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>token</color></size> on kill
Power.BatterUp.Brief: Let's hit it out of the park!
Power.BatterUp.Lore:
Embodies the concept of a certain pastime to allow the repurposing of tokens for a more...direct form of attack.

Bat not included...but this is so much more fun!
- Gachapon
Power.PiratesBooty.Title: Pirate's Booty
Power.PiratesBooty.Description:
<size=28><color=#FFED75>Skull enemies</color></size> have a <size=28><color=#FFED75>10%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+10% per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>chance</color></size> to drop a <size=28><color=#FFED75>Pirate chest</color></size> or <size=28><color=#FFED75>key</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(consumed on use)</color></size> 
Drops a <size=28><color=#FFED75>key</color></size> when <size=28><color=#FFED75>dissolved</color></size> in a <size=28><color=#FFED75>Crucible</color></size>
Power.PiratesBooty.Brief: Next killed Skull enemy has a chance to drop a chest or key
Power.PiratesBooty.Lore:
An ancient pirate's hoard contained in a power bubble, rewarding the user with treasure upon the defeat of powerful enemies. The treausure in the hoard can also be partially extracted using a crucible.

I'm glad that we haven't run into any bubbleverse pirates yet. Not that the infectors are any better.
- TB
Power.Eureka.Title: Eureka!
Power.Eureka.Description: Reduces <color=#CFCFFF>Choice</color> <size=28><color=#FFED75>Reroll</color></size> cost by <size=28><color=#FFED75>2</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+2 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>gems</color></size> and increases <size=28><color=#FFED75>Reroll</color></size> count by <size=28><color=#FFED75>1</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size>
Power.Eureka.Brief: Reduces Choice Reroll cost and increases Reroll count
Power.Eureka.Lore: Sometimes the greatest of revelations come during the most mundane moments.
Power.Eureka.BlackMarketDescription: Reduces <color=#CFCFFF>Choice</color> <size=28><color=#FFED75>Reroll</color></size> cost by <size=28><color=#FFED75>5</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+5 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>gems</color></size> and increases <size=28><color=#FFED75>Reroll</color></size> count by <size=28><color=#FFED75>1</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size>
Power.BlackMarketDelivery.Title: Special Delivery
Power.BlackMarketDelivery.Description: Each <size=28><color=#FFED75>Skull Wave</color></size> has a <size=28><color=#FFED75>10%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+10% per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>chance</color></size> to drop a <size=28><color=#FFED75>Black Market crate</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(consumed on use)</color></size>
Power.BlackMarketDelivery.Brief: The next Skull Wave has a chance to deliver a Black Market crate
Power.BlackMarketDelivery.Lore: This was originally planned to be an actual air drop, but then someone got the idea to put the airdrop in a power bubble. As for who bubblefied it, no one knows.
Power.ShardsOfPower.Title: Shards of Power
Power.ShardsOfPower.Description:
Drops <size=28><color=#FFED75>3 Rainbow Shards</color></size> when <size=28><color=#FFED75>dissolved</color></size> in a <size=28><color=#FFED75>Crucible</color></size> 
<size=28><color=#FFED75>Rainbow Shards</color></size> can be used to <size=28><color=#FFED75>duplicate</color></size> any <size=28><color=#FFED75>power</color></size> you have
Power.ShardsOfPower.Lore:
An extremely powerful substance that can be made into anything.

A pity that the crucible's melting process is too crude to extract the original shards. Actually...it's probably for the best that the crucible's engineer made it like it is.
- TB

Wonder if you could make a soda outta those rainbow things
- Fizzy
Power.Contract.Title: Contract
Power.Contract.Description: <size=28><color=#FFED75>Trade</color></size> for a <size=28><color=#FFED75>power</color></size> from a given selection
Power.Contract.Lore:
A modified choice bubble that takes something from the user in return.

Who's making the offer???
- Gachapon

I'm confused on that as well. My theory is that it simply represents the concept of a deal, but whether the powers it takes from you are being used for something, somewhere, we can only wonder.
- TB
Power.RainbowFlower.Title: Rainbow Flower
Power.RainbowFlower.Description:
Drops a <size=28><color=#FFED75>Rainbow Shard</color></size> when <size=28><color=#FFED75>dissolved</color></size> in a <size=28><color=#FFED75>Crucible,</color></size> with a <size=28><color=#FFED75>50% chance</color></size> for an <size=28><color=#FFED75>additional shard, rolled until failure</color></size> 
<size=28><color=#FFED75>Rainbow Shards</color></size> can be used to <size=28><color=#FFED75>duplicate</color></size> any <size=28><color=#FFED75>power</color></size> you have
Power.RainbowFlower.Lore:
A wondrous flower with a gift that keeps on giving.

It's so pretty!
- Bubblemancer

It seems someone at some point chose to use their extreme power for the pursuit beauty. A romantic sentiment, but unfortunately the arts are of little use to us while we face our current disaster. It's only practical use is in breaking down its impressively dense composition of rainbow shards.
- TB
Power.QuantumCake.Title: Quantum Cake
Power.QuantumCake.Description: Drops a <size=28><color=#FFED75>Heart</color></size> and becomes a <color=#FFAAAA>Schrodinger's Cake</color> when <size=28><color=#FFED75>dissolved</color></size> in a <size=28><color=#FFED75>Crucible</color></size>
Power.QuantumCake.Brief: And you can eat it too!
Power.QuantumCake.Lore: A tasty and scientifically confounding dessert. It's restorative properties can be extracted through a crucible.
Power.EatenCake.Title: Schrodinger's Cake
Power.EatenCake.Description: Becomes a <color=#FFAAAA>Quantum Cake</color> at the start of a <size=28><color=#FFED75>wave</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(consumed on use)</color></size>
Power.EatenCake.Brief: And you can have it too!
Power.EatenCake.Lore: The "blueprint" of a quantum cake, requiring localized bubbleverse stabilization to materialize.
Power.GlassShard.Title: Glass Knife
Power.GlassShard.Description:
All attacks deal <size=28><color=#FFED75>+1</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>bonus damage</color></size> 
<size=28><color=#FFAAAAFF>When hurt,</color></size> roll <size=28><color=#FFED75>1</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size> times for a <size=28><color=#FFED75>50% chance</color></size> to take <size=28><color=#FFED75>additional damage</color></size>
Power.GlassShard.Lore:
A sharp implement that makes the user stronger but more fragile.

Scary! Who would make such a thing?!
- Bubblemancer
Power.BountyHunter.Title: Bounty Hunter
Power.BountyHunter.Description: <size=28><color=#FFED75>Skull enemies</color></size> have a <size=28><color=#FFED75>4%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+2% per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>chance</color></size> to drop a <size=28><color=#FFED75>Pirate chest, a key, 3 gems, or 50 coins</color></size>
Power.BountyHunter.Brief: Skull enemies have a chance to drop extra loot
Power.BountyHunter.Lore: A targeting scope that likely belonged to an experienced merceneary. Rewards the user for taking down powerful enemies.
Power.BonusFizz.Title: Bottle Burst
Power.BonusFizz.Description: Increases the amount of bubbles shot by your <size=28><color=#FFED75>primary attack</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>20%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+20% per stack)</color></size>
Power.BonusFizz.Brief: Increases the amount of bubbles shot by your primary attack
Power.BonusFizz.Lore: This entry has no associated notes
Power.BottleBlast.Title: Bottle Blast
Power.BottleBlast.Description: <size=28><color=#FFED75>Secondary attack</color></size> releases <size=28><color=#FFED75>4</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+4 per stack)</color></size> additional bubbles on impact
Power.BottleBlast.Lore: This entry has no associated notes
Power.BottleFlip.Title: Bottle Flip
Power.BottleFlip.Description: <size=28><color=#FFED75>Secondary attack</color></size> bounces and <size=28><color=#FFED75>explodes</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>1</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size> additional times
Power.BottleFlip.Brief: Secondary attack bounces and explodes an additional time
Power.BottleFlip.Lore: This entry has no associated notes
Power.FancyFootwork.Title: Fancy Footwork
Power.FancyFootwork.Description:
Gain a <size=28><color=#FFED75>20%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+10% per stack)</color></size> chance to <size=28><color=#FFED75>dodge damage</color></size> 
Chance to <size=28><color=#FFED75>dodge</color></size> reduced by <size=28><color=#FFED75>50%</color></size> for each <size=28><color=#FFED75>consecutive dodge</color></size>
Power.FancyFootwork.Lore: This entry has no associated notes
Power.CarbonForce.Title: Carbon Force
Power.CarbonForce.Description: Small bubbles gain <size=28><color=#FFED75>+1</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>pierce</color></size> and travel <size=28><color=#FFED75>10%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+10% per stack)</color></size> further and faster
Power.CarbonForce.Brief: Small bubbles get additional pierce and travel further
Power.CarbonForce.Lore: This entry has no associated notes
Power.FlavorExplosion.Title: Flavor Explosion
Power.FlavorExplosion.Description:
Small bubbles <size=28><color=#FFED75>splash</color></size> on hit or upon expiring for <size=28><color=#FFED75>20%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+5% per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>damage</color></size> 
<size=28><color=#FFED75>Splash size</color></size> scales with <size=28><color=#FFED75>damage</color></size>
Power.FlavorExplosion.Brief: Small bubbles splash on hit or upon expiring
Power.FlavorExplosion.Lore: This entry has no associated notes
Power.SplashRadius.Title: Splash Radius
Power.SplashRadius.Description: Increases <size=28><color=#FFED75>cola splash radius</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>10%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+10% per stack)</color></size>
Power.SplashRadius.Lore: This entry has no associated notes
Power.BonusBoards.Title: Bonus Boards
Power.BonusBoards.Lore: This entry has no associated notes
Power.Kickflip.Title: Kickflip
Power.Kickflip.Description:
Increases <size=28><color=#FFED75>movement speed</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>15%</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+15% per stack)</color></size> while <size=28><color=#FFED75>mounting</color></size> or <size=28><color=#FFED75>dismounting</color></size> your <size=28><color=#FFED75>Skateboard</color></size> 
Increases <size=28><color=#FFED75>Skateboard</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>damage</color></size> by <size=28><color=#FFED75>1</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+1 per stack)</color></size>
Power.Kickflip.Brief: Faster movement while mounting or dismounting Skateboard
Power.Kickflip.Lore: This entry has no associated notes
Power.RetaliatoryBlast.Title: Retaliatory Blast
Power.RetaliatoryBlast.Description:
Drop a <size=28><color=#FFED75>10</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+10 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>damage bath bomb when hurt</color></size> 
<size=28><color=#FFED75>Explosion size</color></size> scales with <size=28><color=#FFED75>damage</color></size>
Power.RetaliatoryBlast.Brief: Drop a high-damage bath bomb when hurt
Power.RetaliatoryBlast.Lore: This entry has no associated notes
Power.BombasticBrew.Title: Bombastic Brew
Power.BombasticBrew.Description:
Secondary attack drops a <size=28><color=#FFED75>2</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+2 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>damage bath bomb</color></size> 
<size=28><color=#FFED75>Explosion size</color></size> scales with <size=28><color=#FFED75>damage</color></size>
Power.BombasticBrew.Brief: Secondary attack drops a bath bomb
Power.BombasticBrew.Lore: This entry has no associated notes
Power.CollateralDamage.Title: Collateral Damage
Power.CollateralDamage.Description:
<size=28><color=#FFED75>Skull enemies</color></size> drop a <size=28><color=#FFED75>5</color></size> <size=24><color=#999999>(+5 per stack)</color></size> <size=28><color=#FFED75>damage bath bomb</color></size> 
<size=28><color=#FFED75>Explosion size</color></size> scales with <size=28><color=#FFED75>damage</color></size>
Power.CollateralDamage.Brief: Skull enemies drop a bath bomb when killed
Power.CollateralDamage.Lore: This entry has no associated notes
Power.ClusterBombs.Title: Cluster Bombs
